meta.title: JJ Mind-Forest
meta.note: the structured shape of memory.md — a forest of projects

nodes.label: 落札ラボ / Rakusat
nodes.body: Court-auction platform. Launched ~2026-05-18.

nodes.label: Auth rescue + read-flip
nodes.body: Front door rebuilt; public read-flip closed the premium leak.

nodes.label: Parsing skill = asset
nodes.body: "grows as we use it" — fixtures + rules survive any engine swap.

nodes.label: 先進入例 secret weapon
nodes.body: Hidden registry-driven reader replacing 例.

nodes.label: Commercialize (info-only)
nodes.body: No 宅建業 license; B2B via 経営革新計画.

nodes.label: jjcashflow
nodes.body: Standalone Diary-Tree cashflow tool.

nodes.label: Decoupled + Stage A live
nodes.body: Own repo + domain; accountant demo on jjconnect.tokyo.

nodes.label: 代為入力 wedge (OCR)
nodes.body: Receipt → AI parse → 勘定科目; sits in front of 勘定奉行.

nodes.label: jjconnect.jp
nodes.body: Company site / community platform.

nodes.label: Auth0 → Supabase
nodes.body: Ripped Auth0 out; aligned to the stack.

nodes.label: Domains suspended
nodes.body: お名前 本人性確認 → moved primary to rakusalab.com.

nodes.label: Mansion Manager
nodes.body: Building logbook → handover tool (design).

nodes.label: keep records, proper, minimal energy
nodes.body: The mission. A standard pre-structures every record.

nodes.label: Two pillars + all-is-money
nodes.body: Records→reports + a compliance schedule; MUST vs preference.

nodes.label: 道 / Do
nodes.body: Decision-support capstone.

nodes.label: Let 道 emerge
nodes.body: Don't impose the model; let it crystallize from records.

nodes.label: AI = 2-touchpoint black box
nodes.body: START (dig) + FINISH (close); the middle stays human.

nodes.label: jjdiary → mind-forest
nodes.body: This. A structured bridge between a mind and an AI's memory.

nodes.label: Forest shipped
nodes.body: Graduated branches become standalone trees.

nodes.label: Structured feed in/out
nodes.body: Structure travels with the message; AI guesses the attachment.

nodes.label: AI-assisted sorting
nodes.body: Human arranges + connects; AI offers opinion. The headache.

nodes.label: Strategy · 経営革新
nodes.body: The business thread under everything.

nodes.label: Value-ladder moat
nodes.body: data → trusted data → opinion → high-value opinion; trust is the currency.

nodes.label: Info-only, no license
nodes.body: What lets a 法人 run without a 宅建業免許.
